import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    hs = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    hn = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)
    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # SUCCESS: pyramid on grid, not held, manhattan dist == 1 to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)

    # Agent distances
    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)

    # Front cell in next state
    dy_n = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    dx_n = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_n = ay_n + dy_n
    front_x_n = ax_n + dx_n
    dist_front_sq_n = jnp.abs(front_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(front_x_n - sq_x_n)

    # Front cell in current state
    dy_s = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    dx_s = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_s = ay_s + dy_s
    front_x_s = ax_s + dx_s
    dist_front_sq_s = jnp.abs(front_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(front_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # === PHASE 1: Not holding → approach pyramid ===
    # Use potential-based shaping: reward for reducing distance to pyramid
    phase1 = (1.0 - hs) * (1.0 - hn)
    r_approach_pyr = phase1 * (dist_agent_pyr_s - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 5.0

    # === PICKUP BONUS ===
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # === PHASE 2: Holding → move so front cell is adjacent to square ===
    # The pyramid gets placed in front of agent, so we want front cell dist to square == 1
    # Reward: minimize |dist_front_sq - 1| (want it exactly 1)
    target = 1.0
    err_s = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_s - target)
    err_n = jnp.abs(dist_front_sq_n - target)
    phase2 = hs * hn
    r_approach_placement = phase2 * (err_s - err_n) / max_dist * 5.0

    # Bonus: holding and front cell is exactly adjacent to square
    front_adj = hn * (dist_front_sq_n >= 0.5).astype(jnp.float32) * (dist_front_sq_n <= 1.5).astype(jnp.float32)
    r_ready = front_adj * 0.5

    # === PUTDOWN REWARD ===
    putdown_good = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    putdown_bad = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5)
    r_putdown = (
        putdown_good.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0
        + putdown_bad.astype(jnp.float32) * (-2.0)
    )

    # === SUCCESS REWARD ===
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 20.0

    # === SMALL ABSOLUTE SHAPING ===
    # When not holding: small reward for being close to pyramid
    r_abs_pyr = (1.0 - hn) * (max_dist - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 0.5
    # When holding: small reward for front cell error being small
    r_abs_front = hn * (max_dist - err_n) / max_dist * 0.5

    total = (
        r_approach_pyr
        + r_pickup
        + r_approach_placement
        + r_ready
        + r_putdown
        + r_success
        + r_abs_pyr
        + r_abs_front
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
